title: carduus scariosus
intro: Carduus scariosus, also known as the prickly thistle or spiny thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a biennial herb with a stout stem and prickly leaves, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Carduus scariosus include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures.
